headline.text: L3 closed *5 problems* in the window but still carrying 6 open items — 4 on ML1 alone — plus slowdowns at L2 and a kitchen leak at L1.

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 2 kitchen has a water leak that's impacting cooking; maintenance notified at 05:35 but no fix yet. Otherwise quiet.
per_plant_summary.L2: FFS line failed ATP at 04:13, ran a Level 2 clean, and was back running by 07:03. ML3 depositor was left off over the weekend and is still struggling to reach temp as of 06:46 despite maintenance purging and pulling filters.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML4 cleared a mold jam, temper issues, and a TG5 power fault, but TG3 is now down on a printer issue as of 07:13. ML1 has four open machine items: low temper, a Bosch alarm, a rejecting sensor, and C5 conveyor rollers being repaired. Truffle Line fixed a guillotine fault but is waiting for temper after a restart.

resolved.title: FFS line failed ATP swab, required Level 2 clean
resolved.summary: Morning ATP test did not pass; sanitation ran a full Level 2 clean, re-tested, and cleared the line to run.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:41 — "Level 2 cleaning was initiated; this passed visual inspection and ATP testing was satisfactory, so we can now begin" (Claudio Tovar). Line running at 07:03.

resolved.title: ML4 TG5 not powering on
resolved.summary: TG5 main breaker would not power the unit; maintenance rigged it and brought it back online.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 06:43 — "TG5 is powering up right now" (Preston Elmer).

resolved.title: Truffle Line guillotine sticking product and faulting
resolved.summary: Product stuck to the guillotine and threw a communication fault; maintenance cleared it and brought the line back.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 06:58 — "Guillotine is now running and no more ultrasonic issues. It had a communication fault that needed to be cleared" (Nathan Ruiz).

resolved.title: ML4 mold jam at demolding during startup
resolved.summary: Molds jammed at the demolding station while starting recirculation; lead cleared it in 5 minutes.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 04:36 — "it's clear now and molds are recirculating" (Itzel Chavez).

resolved.title: ML4 first temper out of spec during startup
resolved.summary: Initial temper sample failed; team made adjustments and was depositing inside 30 minutes.

resolved.title: ML4 recurring mold jams at cold stamp section
resolved.summary: Molds with dried chocolate inside — likely returned dirty to the magazine — jammed the cold stamp twice; team cleaned a plate and cleared both.
resolved.resolution: Cleared by 06:49 — "Running" (Itzel Chavez). Root cause identified at 07:12.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 kitchen water leak impacting cooking
needs_attention.summary: Water leak in the S2 kitchen is affecting cook operations; maintenance was to address it when they arrive but no confirmation of fix.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 05:20, maintenance to address when they arrive per Justin at 05:35, no update by end of window.

needs_attention.title: ML3 depositor won't heat up, temps still low
needs_attention.summary: Depositor was left off over the weekend and is struggling to reach 89 degrees; maintenance purged tempering devices and pulled filters but temps climbing slowly as of 06:46.
needs_attention.status: Temps coming up slowly as of 06:46 after maintenance purged and pulled filters; still not at target.

needs_attention.title: ML1 Bosch alarm triggered, unit won't turn on
needs_attention.summary: Bosch threw an alarm and will not power back on; maintenance was notified at 06:38 but no resolution posted.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance notified at 06:38, no update by end of window.

needs_attention.title: ML4 TG3 down due to printer issue
needs_attention.summary: TG3 went down at 07:13 with the same printer fault that hit TG5 earlier; no fix attempted yet.
needs_attention.status: Down as of 07:13, no resolution by end of window.

needs_attention.title: ML1 temper very low, operator adjusting
needs_attention.summary: Temper reading came in very low at 05:56; operator made adjustments but no follow-up on whether it stabilized.
needs_attention.status: Operator adjusting as of 05:56, no update by end of window.

needs_attention.title: ML1 sensor B100B rejecting excessive product
needs_attention.summary: Sensor B100B is firing and rejecting too much good product; no root cause or fix mentioned.
needs_attention.status: Reported at 06:47, no update by end of window.

needs_attention.title: Truffle Line waiting for temper after machine restart
needs_attention.summary: Guillotine fix required a restart that wiped the recipe; line is waiting for temper to come back up.
needs_attention.status: Waiting for temper as of 07:10, no update by end of window.

needs_attention.title: ML1 C5 conveyor coner rollers not spinning
needs_attention.summary: Coner rollers on conveyor belt C5 were not spinning; maintenance pulled them for repair at 07:15.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance removed rollers for repair at 07:15, no update on timeline or completion.
